headline: Senior R&D leader for emissions-monitoring data-controller products
title: Sr. Mgr. R&D
confidenceNote: Public ESC Spectrum pages identify Anthony Dougherty as Senior R&D Manager and describe his responsibility for 8864 development; Alliance acquisition pages connect ESC Spectrum to Alliance Technical Group.
bioMarkdown: Senior R&D manager focused on continuous emissions monitoring and data acquisition systems. Anthony has led development work around ESC Spectrum's 8864 data-controller platform, with experience spanning project engineering, product engineering, customer success, business analysis, and software development.

primary.label: ESC Spectrum user group bio
primary.note: Lists Anthony Dougherty as Senior R&D Manager and describes his ESC Spectrum tenure, 8864 responsibilities, and electrical engineering background.

primary.label: Alliance Technical Group acquisition announcement
primary.note: Shows ESC Spectrum became part of Alliance Technical Group, tying his ESC Spectrum role to the current company context.

secondary.label: ESC Spectrum 8864 Gen 2 release
secondary.note: Quotes Anthony Dougherty as Senior R&D Manager on the 8864 Data Controller Generation 2 product.

headline: Co-founder building agent-oriented cloud infrastructure tooling
title: Co-Founder
confidenceNote: Spawned's own site lists Anton Forsman as a co-founder; LinkedIn search snippets align on Spawned and Sweden.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder of Spawned.ai, a platform aimed at making cloud infrastructure easier for agents and engineering teams to deploy, version, and operate across AWS, GCP, and Azure.

headline: Technology leader associated with BrokerSnapshot's freight-risk intelligence platform
title: CTO
confidenceNote: BrokerSnapshot's public site verifies the company and product domain, but public evidence directly verifying Anton Kaspirovich's CTO role at BrokerSnapshot is limited.
bioMarkdown: Technology executive connected to BrokerSnapshot, a carrier and broker intelligence platform for logistics teams. Useful contact for conversations about freight-risk data, carrier vetting workflows, compliance records, and applied data products in transportation.

headline: Co-founder and CPO of Arize AI, focused on AI observability and evaluation
title: Co-Founder
confidenceNote: Arize and Aparna's public profiles consistently identify her as Co-Founder and Chief Product Officer, with prior ML infrastructure experience at Uber, Apple, and TubeMogul.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and Chief Product Officer at Arize AI, working on observability and evaluation for production AI systems and agents. Previously worked in ML engineering and infrastructure at Uber, Apple, and TubeMogul, and is a frequent speaker and writer on ML/LLM reliability.
